business_goal: Demonstrate TraderFrame's evidence-first decision process through a premium interactive 3D narrative
core_message: Market conviction becomes credible when evidence is filtered, challenged, approved and recorded transparently
objective: Classify assets by role and complexity

core_assets.name: Evidence Gate Interface
core_assets.description: Interactive 3D interface where traders input, filter, and validate market evidence. Features layered transparency, risk indicators, and real-time feedback. Must support multi-user collaboration and version control.

core_assets.name: Evidence Timeline
core_assets.description: 3D timeline that visually maps the progression of evidence collection, challenge, approval, and recording. Supports dynamic annotations, user-controlled pacing, and branching paths for different risk scenarios.

core_assets.name: Market Evidence Library
core_assets.description: 3D library with categorized, searchable, and taggable evidence sources. Includes visual indicators of reliability, timeliness, and relevance. Supports user-defined filters and risk-based sorting.

supporting_assets.name: Risk Dashboard
supporting_assets.description: 3D dashboard that overlays risk metrics on the decision process. Includes heatmaps, risk thresholds, and user-controlled alerts. Must integrate with live market data feeds.

supporting_assets.name: User Control Panel
supporting_assets.description: 3D panel allowing users to adjust transparency levels, filter criteria, and risk parameters. Supports user-defined workflows and saved configurations.

supporting_assets.name: Transaction Log
supporting_assets.description: 3D log that records and visualizes approved decisions with timestamps, evidence sources, and risk ratings. Supports export and audit trails.

environment_assets.name: Trading Workspace
environment_assets.description: 3D environment that simulates a professional trading workspace. Includes interactive whiteboards, data visualization panels, and a central control hub. Supports multi-user presence and real-time collaboration.

environment_assets.name: Market Data Visualizer
environment_assets.description: 3D visualization of real-time market data, including price movements, volume, and sentiment. Supports user-defined data layers and interactive exploration.

environment_assets.name: Evidence Validation Panel
environment_assets.role: Tool for challenging and approving evidence
environment_assets.description: 3D panel that allows users to review, challenge, and approve evidence. Includes visual indicators of evidence strength, user feedback, and approval status.

notes.implementation: All assets must be production-ready, with support for real-time interaction, multi-user collaboration, and integration with live market data feeds. Assets should reflect the brand principles of transparency, user control, and risk awareness.
notes.guidelines: Avoid unsupported product facts. Focus on asset roles and complexity as defined by the narrative and brand principles. Ensure assets are scalable and modular for future expansion.
